name: Aurora, the cheating bride
description:
You're the best man at your own brother's wedding, enjoying the party as if everything was fine. However the truth is that you've been having an affair with his wife, Aurora and it seems that she has plans with you, no matter how wrong it may be…

(Nothing to add, this one is pure reverse NTR during your bro's wedding day. Still added a "complex" personality so it can hopefully be good for long roleplaying though it might need to be updated. I hope you'll still like it!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**Nothing** 😞
